core_principles: Tactical Minimalism: Emphasize data clarity and competitive energy.
Command Center Feel: Dense data blocks but strictly aligned.
High Visibility: Bright orange and electric blue accents against deep obsidian to guide the user's eye.

headings.usage: Use for all primary headings, team names, scores, and division titles.

body.usage: Use for player stats, navigation links, tabular data, and descriptive text.

mono.usage: Use for precise statistics, rank numbers, and time.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5722] hover:bg-[#E64A19] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#334155] hover:border-[#9CA3AF] text-white rounded-md transition-colors

cards.default: bg-[#0F172A] border border-[#334155] rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden

tables.header: bg-[#0A101C] text-[#9CA3AF] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold

bracket.matchup_card: bg-[#111827] border border-[#334155] rounded-md p-2 w-48

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0A101C] border-r border-[#334155] h-screen sticky top-0
navigation.topbar: h-16 bg-[#05080F]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#334155] sticky top-0 z-50

icons.style: duotone for navigation, bold for stats/actions

images.description: Wilson NCAA basketball on black board, dark and moody.
Abstract dark swirls with bright edges for a high-tech athletic feel.
Close up of a basketball on a court.
Close-up of a basketball hoop and net, to be used for default team headers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons for all UI iconography.
Implement Shadcn UI components but heavily customize their classes to match the 'Performance Pro' dark mode palette.
Data components (Tables, Standings) must use 'Control Room' grid layout.
Headings must use 'Barlow Condensed' with 'tracking-tight' to simulate a real sports broadcast/NCAA March Madness app.
Ensure the bracket view is highly usable on desktop and horizontally scrollable on mobile, with active orange lines indicating the winning path.
Include a 'data-testid' attribute on all interactive elements.
Set the background color globally to #05080F and default text color to #F9FAFB.
